title: Library of Congress: Westward Expansion Sources
description: A LOC source card for westward expansion primary sources and maps.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress westward expansion sources include maps, photographs, documents, and accounts connected to migration, land, conflict, and federal policy.
Use this source to compare maps with narratives, discuss whose perspectives are present or missing, and analyze change over time.
Library of Congress rights statements differ by item. Check each map, image, and document before copying or adapting it.
